title: Claude Ecosystem Daily Watch — April 16, 2026
summary: High-activity day: Claude Opus 4.7 launched (GA, breaking API changes vs 4.6). Claude Code Desktop redesigned with Mission Control sidebar + Routines automation (Scheduled/API/Webhook) in research preview. Sonnet 4 + Opus 4 deprecated (Jun 15 retirement). CC 2.1.110 ships MCP SSE hang fix critical for Jarvis. 5 P1/P2 actions generated across FinancialReportApp, Ajax, and Jarvis.
features_covered: Claude Opus 4.7 launch (API breaking changes, new tokenizer)
Claude Code Desktop redesign — Mission Control sidebar, Side Chat
Routines research preview — Scheduled, API, Webhook modes
Model deprecation — Sonnet 4 + Opus 4 retiring June 15 2026
Claude Managed Agents public beta (managed-agents-2026-04-01 header)
Claude Code 2.1.110 — MCP SSE hang fix, push notifications, /tui, security hardening
